calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. apecial appearance for the plaintiff Global Acceptance Credit Company LP.
Order waiving live testimony was granted in
Default of Defendant Kenneth Malamud has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46939.55
Prejudgment Interest - $16808.02
Costs - $469.00, for a Total of $64,216.57
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
